steps.title: Compare ages to the split
steps.content: Text 1 defines Gondwanan clades as clades that predate Grande Terre’s split from Gondwana about 80 million years ago. Text 2 gives crown ages of 48.9 million years for harvest spiders and 2.7 million years for cockroaches. This timing is the decisive evidence.

steps.title: Draw the supported conclusion
steps.content: Choice A and Choice D wrongly make the harvest spider clade older than the split. Choice B adds a colonization claim that the texts do not establish. Since both crown ages are younger than the 80-million-year split, neither clade originated on Gondwana. The answer is C.
